author: gb9t
content:
Iter 66 — breadth-first Tier-2 wrappers (passthrough triangle):

- drivers/iommu/00-overview.md: full IOMMU stack — iommu core API + iommu-sva (PASID-bound mm) + io-pgfault (PRI fault handling) + IOVA allocator with per-cpu rcache magazines + iommu-pages page-table-page allocator + dma-iommu (DMA-API backend over IOMMU) + irq_remapping (Intel IR + AMD IR) + iommufd (full /dev/iommu UAPI replacing legacy VFIO type1: IOAS + HWPT + viommu + vdevice + eventq + vfio_compat shim) + Intel VT-d full (DMAR / iommu / pasid / prq / svm / nested / perfmon / IR) + AMD-Vi full (init/IVRS / iommu / pasid / ppr / nested / iommufd backend / quirks) + virtio-iommu + hyperv-iommu. 13 REQ-O / 12 AC-O / 5 mandatory TLA+ models / 3 Verus contracts / 27 Tier-3 children declared.
- drivers/vfio/00-overview.md: VFIO full surface — vfio core + group cdev + container + device-cdev (modern per-device) + iommufd backend + vfio_iommu_type1 (legacy) + virqfd (eventfd-backed IRQ) + vfio-pci (core/config/intrs/rdwr/igd/dmabuf/zdev) + mdev (NVIDIA-vGPU / Intel-GVT-g / S390 ccw/AP) + vendor variant drivers for live migration (mlx5/pds/qat/hisilicon/nvgrace-gpu/xe/virtio/ism). 13 REQ-O / 12 AC-O / 5 mandatory TLA+ models / 3 Verus contracts / 22 Tier-3 children declared.

Total state: 170 .design docs, 35 Tier-2 wrappers (15 top-level + 20 sub-tier-2). Passthrough triangle KVM ↔ IOMMU ↔ VFIO now fully wrapped at Tier-2.

Knowledge pages: design-drivers-iommu-overview, design-drivers-vfio-overview.

Iter 67 plan: kernel/irq/00-overview.md (irq subsystem core + irqdomain + irq_chip + msi_domain + softirq/tasklet — foundational, referenced by every device driver) + kernel/dma/00-overview.md (DMA-API + swiotlb + dma-direct + dma-coherent — the kernel DMA-mapping core that dma-iommu sits behind).
